# Open Language Profiles Snapshot

Local, vendored snapshot of `openlanguageprofiles/olp-en-cefrj` used by `php artisan linguistics:sync`.

Source repository: https://github.com/openlanguageprofiles/olp-en-cefrj

Included files:

- `cefr-j-vocabulary-profile-1.5.csv` — CEFR-J Vocabulary Profile v1.5.
- `octanove-vocabulary-profile-c1c2-1.0.csv` — Octanove C1/C2 vocabulary supplement.
- `cefr-j-grammar-profile-20180315.csv` — CEFR-J Grammar Profile.

Terms summarized from upstream README:

- CEFR-J vocabulary and grammar profile datasets may be used for research and commercial purposes with proper citation.
- CEFR-J copyright belongs to Tono Laboratory at Tokyo University of Foreign Studies.
- Octanove C1/C2 vocabulary is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International.

Do not download these files during production deploy. Update this snapshot intentionally and review diffs.
